skills.pw-manipulate-pages: Can create/edit/delete any Page using the $pages API
skills.pw-schema-management: Can define new Fields and Templates via CLI or API
skills.pw-schema-architect: Expert in designing complex relationships between templates and fields
skills.pw-query-expert: Master of the ProcessWire Selector engine for complex data retrieval
skills.pw-security-warden: Enforces strict input sanitization and granular permission checks
skills.pw-module-scaffolder: Can build specialized Fieldtype, Inputfield, and Process modules
skills.pw-system-admin: Manages users, roles, system logs, and maintenance tasks
